    addEquipment(String) - Method in class jobs.Job
    Adds equipment to the ArrayList for starting equipment the user selects throughout the process

    Astrologian - Class in jobs
    Represents the Astrologian job and its specific choices
    Astrologian() - Constructor for class jobs.Astrologian
    Sets the name and description
    AuRa - Class in races
    Represents the Au Ra race and its specific stat bonuses
    AuRa() - Constructor for class races.AuRa
    Constructs a new Au Ra character, initializing their specific base stats, walking speed, and racial traits.
    AuRa.AuRaClan - Enum Class in races
    Represents the two distinct Auri clans
